case_title: LEWIS,MARILYN ADMINSTRATOR ESTATE OF THOMPSON vs. HOLDMAN, ERNEST et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE WICK, B FIELDS, REPORTER C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFT. WITNESS SWORN & EXAMINED, EXHIBITS INTRO & ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE. JUDGE SARAH SPERO, RPTR. B. FIELDS, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. JEFFREY E. MARGULIES DEFT. KEISHA HOLDMAN PRESENT, DEFT. ERNEST HOLDMAN NOT PRESENT. 2PM C/C FOR SETTLMNT. CONF: STIP. SETTLMNT. FOR JUDGMNT. AS TO KEISHA HOLDMAN ONLY. DEFT. TO VACATE BY 7PM ON 9/5/94. JUDGMNT. FOR PLTF. POSS. OF PREMISES: 1900 MCALLISTER ST. LEASE FORFEIT. WRIT MAY ISSUE F/W. STAY EXECUTION 9/5/94. EACH SIDE WAIVE CLAIMS. NO FURTHER STAY. RENT $3,000.00. CASE TO BE DISMISSED IF DEFT. VACATES TIMELY.
